creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
skype-devel is known to be broken in more that one way,
I'm working on some fixes.
Please try the non-devel port and tell me if you get the same problem.

-- 
IOnut - Un^d^dregistered ;) FreeBSD "user"
